common.uidMissing: Please reopen the link including the ?uid=… parameter.

notFound.title: Cannot enter the survey
notFound.lead: Sorry, the link you used is incomplete or contains invalid parameters, and the system cannot create a valid response record for you.
notFound.warn: To preserve research data integrity and your rights, none of your actions on this page {strong}, nor will any personally identifiable information be stored.
notFound.action: Please close this page directly. We apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your original willingness to participate in this research.
notFound.contactPrefix: If you have any questions about this research, please contact the research team:

deviceBlock.title: Please use a computer to complete this survey
deviceBlock.lead: This survey does not support phones or tablets. Please reopen the invitation link on a desktop or laptop computer to continue.
deviceBlock.action: If you do not have access to a computer at the moment, please close this page. Thank you for your willingness to take part in this research.
deviceBlock.contactPrefix: If you have any questions about this research, please contact the research team:

practice.title: Slider Practice

intro.lead: When answering, move the slider to your desired position and click the check mark on the bottom right to confirm. Please note, {strong}.
intro.leadStrong: your answer cannot be modified once confirmed

variantPlaceholder.woEOwoRAM: [woEO-woRAM | Control] Placeholder for the production-version instructions and image.
variantPlaceholder.wEOwoRAM: [wEO-woRAM | with Encouragement Offering, no RAM] Placeholder for the production-version instructions and image (including encouragement message).
variantPlaceholder.woEOwRAM: [woEO-wRAM | no Encouragement Offering, with RAM] Placeholder for the production-version instructions and image (including Response Activation Model prompts).
variantPlaceholder.wEOwRAM: [wEO-wRAM | with Encouragement Offering, with RAM] Placeholder for the production-version instructions and image (including encouragement message and Response Activation Model prompts).

practice.question: Do you understand how the slider works? *

survey.title: Dietary Behavior Survey
survey.uidWarning: ⚠ User ID not found. Please enter this page via the provided link.

intro.h2: Report your dietary behavior over the past week
intro.p: Please use the slider to indicate your level of agreement with each statement (1 = lowest, 7 = highest).

survey.validationHint: Please confirm all items before continuing ({done}/{total} confirmed)

questions.text: In the past week, did you eat three meals regularly?
questions.minLabel: I never ate three meals regularly in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I ate three meals regularly every day in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you eat candy or snacks?
questions.minLabel: I ate candy or snacks every day in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I never ate candy or snacks in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you chew your food thoroughly, chewing at least 20 times per bite before swallowing?
questions.minLabel: I never chewed my food thoroughly before swallowing in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I chewed at least 20 times per bite in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, when you were thirsty or it was hot, did you drink unhealthy beverages (sugary or alcoholic) besides plain water?
questions.minLabel: I drank unhealthy beverages every day in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I drank only plain water in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you eat fried or greasy foods (e.g., peanuts, chips, fried chicken)?
questions.minLabel: I ate fried foods every day in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I never ate fried foods in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you eat fruit every day?
questions.minLabel: I never ate fruit in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I ate fruit every day in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you eat green vegetables every day?
questions.minLabel: I never ate green vegetables in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I ate green vegetables every day in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you eat late-night snacks every day?
questions.minLabel: I ate late-night snacks every day in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I never ate late-night snacks in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you eat while watching TV or using a tablet, phone, or computer?
questions.minLabel: I was distracted while eating in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I focused on eating in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, when you were in a bad mood, did you eat to make yourself feel better?
questions.minLabel: I ate to improve my mood every time in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I never ate to improve my mood in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you use food as a reward or as a way to celebrate?
questions.minLabel: I used food as a reward every time in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I never used food as a reward in the past seven days

questions.text: In the past week, did you wait until you were very hungry to go grocery shopping?
questions.minLabel: I always waited until I was very hungry to shop in the past seven days
questions.maxLabel: I never waited until I was very hungry to shop in the past seven days

summary.title: Response Summary
summary.subtitle: Please review your answers and respond to the final few questions below.
summary.noAnswers: No survey responses found. Please start from the beginning.

score.label: Total Score
score.hint: A higher score indicates healthier dietary behavior

postIntro.p: Please use the slider to answer based on how you feel (0 = lowest, 9 = highest).

postQuestions.text: How likely is it that your close friends would lie when answering this survey?
How likely is it that a typical respondent would lie when answering this survey?
How likely is it that you lied when answering this survey just now?

summary.validationHint: Please confirm all items before submitting ({done}/{total} confirmed)
summary.errorMsg: Upload failed. Please click "Go to the final survey" to retry.
